moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Let me confirm your hours for this week.
chinese: 我确认一下你这周的工时。
scenario: 确认打卡、工时、加班和工资到账。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Let me check your hours for this week.
I want to confirm your weekly hours.
recommendedResponses: I worked thirty-two hours this week.
I think two hours are missing.

dialogue.english: Let me confirm your hours for this week.
dialogue.chinese: 我确认一下你这周的工时。

dialogue.english: Okay. I worked thirty-two hours.
dialogue.chinese: 好的。我工作了三十二个小时。

dialogue.english: Thanks. I will check the time sheet.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这里指员工这一周实际工作的小时数。
vocabularyNotes.example: My hours are wrong.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
scenarioTitle: 班次、打卡、工资、请假、交接班。
english: Finish this before your break.
chinese: 休息前把这项工作完成。
scenario: 主管根据工作进度安排员工完成一项短任务后休息。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Finish this before your break.

dialogue.english: Finish this before your break.
dialogue.chinese: 休息前把这项工作完成。

dialogue.english: Okay, I’ll do it now.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Finish this before your break.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Please notify me before leaving your work area.
chinese: 离开工作区域前请先通知我。
scenario: 把没做完的工作交代给下一班。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Tell me before you leave your station.
Let me know before you step away.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I will tell you before I leave.
Got it. I will ask first.
I will notify you before I step away.

dialogue.english: Please notify me before leaving your work area.
dialogue.chinese: 离开工作区域前请先通知我。

dialogue.english: Okay, I will tell you before I leave.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我离开前会先告诉你。

dialogue.english: Thank you. I need to know where you are.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢。我需要知道你在哪里。

vocabularyNotes.note: 迟到、请假或离岗前告诉主管。
vocabularyNotes.example: Notify the manager.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: I am going to be late for my shift.
chinese: 我上班会迟到。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: I am going to be late for my shift.
recommendedResponses: Can you help me fix it?

dialogue.english: I am going to be late for my shift.
Thanks for checking.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: I am going to be late for my shift.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: I am sick and cannot come to work today.
chinese: 我生病了，今天不能来上班。
scenario: 身体不舒服或有事时，用简单英文请假。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: I am sick and cannot work today.
I am sick and cannot come in today.
recommendedResponses: Please rest and keep me updated.
Do you think you can work tomorrow?

dialogue.english: I am sick and cannot come to work today.
dialogue.chinese: 我生病了，今天不能来上班。

dialogue.english: Thanks for letting me know. Please rest today.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢你告诉我。今天好好休息。

dialogue.english: Thank you. I will update you tomorrow.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢。我明天再跟你更新。

vocabularyNotes.note: 员工说明自己今天不能到店上班时使用。
vocabularyNotes.example: I can come to work tomorrow.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: My schedule shows the wrong shift.
chinese: 我的排班显示错了。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: My shift looks wrong on the schedule.
The schedule has the wrong shift for me.

dialogue.english: My schedule shows the wrong shift.
Which shift looks wrong?
It says I work Friday, but I asked for Friday off.
dialogue.chinese: 上面写我周五上班，但我申请了周五休息。

dialogue.english: Let me check it now.

vocabularyNotes.note: 餐厅安排你上班的日期和时间。
vocabularyNotes.example: Check your schedule.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Do not swap shifts without approval.
chinese: 未经批准不要私自换班。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: You need approval before swapping shifts.
Do not switch shifts unless a manager approves it.
recommendedResponses: Got it. I will not switch without approval.

dialogue.english: Do not swap shifts without approval.
dialogue.chinese: 未经批准不要私自换班。

dialogue.english: Okay, I will ask for approval first.

vocabularyNotes.note: 和同事交换上班时间。
vocabularyNotes.example: Can we swap shifts?

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can I switch shifts with my coworker?
chinese: 我可以和同事换班吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Can I switch shifts with my coworker, please?
recommendedResponses: Can you help me fix it?

dialogue.english: Can I switch shifts with my coworker?
Thanks for checking.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Can I switch shifts with my coworker?

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Please complete the handoff before you leave.
chinese: 离开前请完成交接。
scenario: 把没做完的工作交代给下一班。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Finish the handoff before leaving.
Complete the shift handoff first.
recommendedResponses: Okay, I’ll finish the handoff now.
Who should I give the handoff note to?
I’ll tell the next person what is left.

dialogue.english: Please complete the handoff before you leave.
Okay, I’ll tell the next person what is left.
dialogue.chinese: 好的，我会告诉下一班还剩什么没做。

vocabularyNotes.note: 下班前把未完成的工作告诉下一班或主管。
vocabularyNotes.example: Write a handoff note.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: This task is not finished yet.
chinese: 这项工作还没有完成。
scenario: 把没做完的工作交代给下一班。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: This job is not done yet.
This task still needs work.
recommendedResponses: Write it in the handoff note.

dialogue.english: This task is not finished yet.
Thanks. Please write it in the handoff note.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢。请把它写在交接说明里。

vocabularyNotes.note: 交接班时说明某项工作还没有做完。
vocabularyNotes.example: The prep is not finished yet.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Record the issue in the shift log.
chinese: 把这个问题记录在班次日志里。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Record the issue in the shift log.
recommendedResponses: Can you help me fix it?

dialogue.english: Record the issue in the shift log.
dialogue.chinese: 把这个问题记录在班次日志里。

dialogue.english: Thanks for checking.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Record the issue in the shift log.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Who is closing tonight?
chinese: 今晚谁关店？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Who closes tonight?
Who is on closing tonight?

dialogue.english: Who is closing tonight?
You are closing with Kevin tonight.
dialogue.chinese: 今晚你和 Kevin 一起关店。

dialogue.english: Okay. What time do we finish?

vocabularyNotes.note: 营业结束后的清洁和检查流程。
vocabularyNotes.example: Finish closing.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Who is opening tomorrow?
chinese: 明天谁开店？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Who opens tomorrow?
Who is on opening tomorrow?

dialogue.english: Who is opening tomorrow?
You open tomorrow at nine.
Okay, I will be here at nine.

vocabularyNotes.note: 餐厅早上开始营业前的班次或准备工作。
vocabularyNotes.example: I am opening tomorrow.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can I switch shifts with Kevin?
chinese: 我可以和 Kevin 换班吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Can Kevin and I switch shifts?
Can I trade shifts with Kevin?
recommendedResponses: Let me check with the manager.

dialogue.english: Can I switch shifts with Kevin?
dialogue.chinese: 我可以和 Kevin 换班吗？

dialogue.english: Does Kevin agree to switch?
Yes, he said it is okay.

vocabularyNotes.note: 两个员工互相交换上班时间，通常需要主管批准。
vocabularyNotes.example: Can we switch shifts?

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班

dialogue.chinese: 我的休息时间记录了吗？

dialogue.english: Let me check your time sheet.

dialogue.english: Thank you. I took my break at two.

vocabularyNotes.note: 询问系统或工时表里是否记录了你的休息时间。

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: I cannot work that day.
chinese: 那天我不能上班。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: I am not available that day.
I cannot take that shift.
recommendedResponses: Can you work a different day?

dialogue.english: I cannot work that day.
Thanks for telling me early. Please request that day off.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢你提前告诉我。请申请那天休假。

dialogue.english: Okay, I will put in the request today.

vocabularyNotes.note: 告诉主管某一天不能被安排上班。

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can I update my availability?

dialogue.english: Yes, send me your new availability by Friday.

dialogue.english: Okay, I will send it today.

vocabularyNotes.note: 告诉主管你哪些天、哪些时间可以上班。
vocabularyNotes.example: Update your availability online.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Can I come in earlier tomorrow?

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can I leave early if it is slow?
chinese: 如果不忙，我可以早点走吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Can I leave early if it is slow, please?

dialogue.english: Can I leave early if it is slow?
dialogue.chinese: 如果不忙，我可以早点走吗？

dialogue.english: Got it.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: Can I leave early if it is slow?

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Who approves time-off requests?
chinese: 谁批准请假申请？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: Who approves requests for time off?
Who should I ask for time off?
recommendedResponses: Submit the request in the schedule app.

dialogue.english: Who approves time-off requests?
The manager approves time-off requests.
Okay, I will ask the manager.

vocabularyNotes.note: 员工想请假时提交给主管或经理的申请。
vocabularyNotes.example: Submit a time-off request.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: I submitted my availability last week.
chinese: 我上周已经提交了可上班时间。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: I submitted my availability last week.

dialogue.english: I submitted my availability last week.
dialogue.chinese: 我上周已经提交了可上班时间。

dialogue.english: Got it.

vocabularyNotes.note: 这句话里的工作关键词。
vocabularyNotes.example: I submitted my availability last week.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班

scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can you fix my clock-in time?
chinese: 你可以帮我修正上班打卡时间吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Can you fix my clock-out time?
chinese: 你可以帮我修正下班打卡时间吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: I covered a shift yesterday.
chinese: 我昨天帮别人顶班了。
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
variants: I worked someone else’s shift yesterday.
I picked up a shift yesterday.
recommendedResponses: Thanks. I will check the time sheet.
Please make sure the hours are recorded.

dialogue.english: I covered a shift yesterday.
Who did you cover for?
I covered Kevin’s evening shift.
dialogue.chinese: 我帮 Kevin 顶了晚班。

vocabularyNotes.note: 表示替别人上了一个班。
vocabularyNotes.example: I covered her shift.

moduleTitle: 排班、工资、请假和交接班
english: Should I write this in the handoff book?
chinese: 我要把这个写在交接本里吗？
scenario: 查看排班、说明迟到、确认换班和下一次上班时间。
importance: 排班和工资说不清，会直接影响收入和工作安排。
